mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_FILES, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(FILE_SIZE), 0) / 1073741824, 2) AS TOTAL_SIZE_GB, SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(UPLOAD_DT) = CURDATE() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NEW_UPLOADS_TODAY FROM DAM_ASSET

SELECT FILE_TYPE AS FILE_TYPE, COUNT(*) AS CNT, ROUND((COUNT(*) / t.TOTAL_CNT) * 100, 2) AS RATIO FROM DAM_ASSET CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM DAM_ASSET ) t GROUP BY FILE_TYPE, t.TOTAL_CNT ORDER BY CNT DESC, FILE_TYPE ASC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m') AS MONTH_LABEL, ROUND(SUM(FILE_SIZE) / 1073741824, 2) AS STORAGE_GB FROM DAM_ASSET GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY MONTH_LABEL ASC

SELECT ASSET_ID AS ASSET_ID, FILE_NM AS FILE_NM, FILE_TYPE AS FILE_TYPE, OWNER_NM AS OWNER_NM, STATUS AS STATUS, PREVIEW_URL AS PREVIEW_URL, DATE_FORMAT(UPLOAD_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UPLOAD_DT FROM DAM_ASSET ORDER BY UPLOAD_DT DESC LIMIT 5
